title: rand() only gets evaluated once when used as an expression
poc: create table t (a int, b int default rand());
alter table t add column c int default rand();
alter table t add column d int default null;
update t set a = a + rand();
key_bug_features: rand() evaluated only once in expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value FLOAT DEFAULT rand());
SELECT id, value + rand() AS random_value FROM test_table;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_value INT DEFAULT rand();
UPDATE test_table SET new_value = id + rand();
